strategy: Seat-plus-credit pricing for governed AI operators. Credits meter cost and risk; high-risk execution remains gated and is not unlocked solely by credits.

tiers.name: Free Trial — One Real Job
tiers.autonomy: L0-L2 by default; L3 drafts only
limits: Unused credits expire and have no cash value

tiers.name: Operator — Small Team
tiers.autonomy: L0-L3; L4 approved execute after setup

tiers.name: Command — Operations Pod
tiers.autonomy: L0-L4 with gates; L5 scoped approval only

tiers.name: Enterprise — Governed Workforce
tiers.autonomy: Configurable governance, RBAC, SSO/SAML target, retention, escalation

credit_formula: credits charged = base job credits + model/runtime credits + connector/action credits + verification credits + risk premium credits
asc606_notes: Bundled subscription credits usually defer revenue until service delivery or over subscription term depending on promise.
Top-up credit packs are deferred revenue until consumed/expired under policy.
Setup/onboarding may be separate performance obligation requiring SSP allocation.
Breakage should not be recognized until supportable and not probable of significant reversal.
Credits have no cash value and are service entitlements only.
abuse_gates: No external sends from trial by default
